---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

::: {.hero-section}

# Hi, I'm Pablo Rogers 👋

::: {.hero-subtitle}
Professor · Researcher · Data Scientist · Finance & Quantitative Methods
:::

::: {.hero-text}
Welcome to my digital space! 🥳🥰🤩 I share information about my professional background, areas of interest, projects, publications, and contact details. I am a professor, researcher, and consultant in **Finance and Quantitative Methods**, with a keen interest in **Information Technology** and **Open Science**.
:::

[About Me](about.html){.btn-cta .btn-orange}
[View CV](cv.html){.btn-cta .btn-outline}

:::

## Explore {.section-heading}

::: {.section-sub}
Navigate through my work and professional journey.
:::

::: {.nav-cards}

::: {.nav-card}
[🧑‍🏫]{.card-icon}
[About Me]{.card-title}
[Personal background, education, and the story of how I built my academic career.]{.card-desc}

[Read more →](about.html)
:::

::: {.nav-card}
[📄]{.card-icon}
[Curriculum]{.card-title}
[Skills, educational background, and a 20+ year professional timeline.]{.card-desc}

[View CV →](cv.html)
:::

::: {.nav-card}
[📊]{.card-icon}
[Portfolio]{.card-title}
[145+ data analysis projects across business, health, finance, psychology, and more.]{.card-desc}

[See projects →](portfolio.html)
:::

::: {.nav-card}
[📚]{.card-icon}
[Publications]{.card-title}
[Scientific articles on quantitative methods, finance, psychometrics, and open science.]{.card-desc}

[Browse papers →](papers.html)
:::

::: {.nav-card}
[🎬]{.card-icon}
[Psico&Econo_METRIA]{.card-title}
[YouTube channel for scientific production and dissemination on data analysis.]{.card-desc}

[Learn more →](psico.html)
:::

:::

## Recent Publications {.section-heading}

::: {.section-sub}
A selection of my most recent work. [See all →](papers.html)
:::

::: {.highlight-grid}

::: {.highlight-card}
[2025]{.hl-year}
[Best Practices for Your Confirmatory Factor Analysis: A JASP and *lavaan* Tutorial]{.hl-title}
[Behavior Research Methods (2024)]{.hl-journal}
:::

::: {.highlight-card}
[2025]{.hl-year}
[Open Science in Three Acts: Foundations, Practice, and Implementation]{.hl-title}
[Brazilian Administration Review]{.hl-journal}
:::

::: {.highlight-card}
[2025]{.hl-year}
[Financial Well-Being, Health, and Quality of Life: Evidence from Investors]{.hl-title}
[International Journal for Quality Research]{.hl-journal}
:::

::: {.highlight-card}
[2024]{.hl-year}
[Unlocking VB-SEM: Practical PLS-SEM Tutorial Using JASP]{.hl-title}
[OSF Preprint]{.hl-journal}
:::

:::

## About This Space {.section-heading}

My professional experience has provided me with the opportunity to teach various undergraduate and graduate courses (**Econometrics, Psychometrics, Financial Mathematics, Investment Analysis, Corporate Finance, Corporate Governance, Behavioral Finance, Capital Markets, Project Management, Accounting**, etc.), where I have had the pleasure of interacting with hundreds of students and sharing my knowledge. I have also been involved in dozens of consulting and research projects throughout my career, a brief description of which can be found on my [CV page](cv.html).

I also dedicate a [page](portfolio.html) of this digital space to describe some data analysis projects (**Data Science portfolio**) that I have carried out since 2015, using varied statistical tools, different levels of complexity, and in diverse areas of knowledge.

In addition to teaching, I am passionate about research, having published **scientific articles** with applications of quantitative methods in **finance and management**. More recently, I have been dedicated to producing materials on **statistical and computational literacy** for applied social scientists, which can be found on my [publications page](papers.html).

Last but not least, I also dedicate [space](psico.html) to talk about the **"Psico&Econo_METRIA" project** — an extension project focused on maintaining a [channel on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/c/PsicoEconoMETRIA) for **scientific production and dissemination** on data analysis in business (**Econometrics**) and applied social sciences (**Psychometrics**).

It's a pleasure to have you here and feel free to get in touch 😉. I will make a tremendous effort to assist you 🤞.
